full_text:
Mohamed Nasser Sheikhon
Cairo, Nasr City, Zahraa Madinet Nasr | +201022752938 | LinkedIn
GitHub | mohamednasserr654@gmail.com

OBJECTIVE
Backend Developer with a strong foundations in computer science and practical experience in building
applications using ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, and SQL Server. Skilled in designing scalable APIs,
integrating databases, and delivering efficient backend solutions. Passionate about backend architecture,
performance optimization, and contributing to impactful software projects.

EDUCATION
Ain Shams University – Faculty of Computer and Information Science
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (Major: Computer Science)
Expected Graduation: July 2026
CGPA: 3.4

INTERNSHIP EXPERIENCE
EJADA Egypt – Backend (Offshore Support & Demand Center) Intern
Ejada, Almazah, Cairo Aug 2025 – Sep 2025

Developed and maintained backend services and web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Spring Security, and
RESTful APIs, ensuring secure and scalable system design.

Leveraged JPA, Hibernate, and Microservices architecture to build scalable, high-performance backend modules
with efficient data handling and persistence.
Information Technology Institute (ITI) – Web Development using ASP.NET Core MVC Intern
Online Sep 2025 – Oct 2025

Completed a practical internship focused on ASP.NET Core MVC Web Development using C#, Entity Framework
Core, and SQL Server.

Gained hands-on experience in building dynamic, data-driven web applications by applying concepts of MVC
architecture, dependency injection, database design, and authentication & authorization.

Applied SOLID principles, clean code practices, and layered architecture to ensure scalability, maintainability,
and high-quality software design.

TRAINING & COURSES
Ain Shams University
Android Development Intern (Summer Training) Aug 2025 – Sep 2025
Built a mobile application using Java and Android SDK as part of the training program.
Web Development Intern (Summer Training) Aug 2024 – Sep 2024
Developed a web project using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as part of the training program.

PROJECTS
 Map Routing Project (C#): Applied graph algorithms (shortest path) with a focus on time complexity
optimization for efficient route calculation.
 Pac-Man Game (C++): Built using Graph and SFML, applying data structures and BFS algorithm, with
basic AI techniques for enemy behavior.
 Operating System (C): Designed and developed operating system modules covering memory
management, process scheduling, and concurrency control with locks.
 Library Management System (Java): Developed using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to
manage books, users, and transactions.
 Flight Reservation DBMS Project (SQL): Developed a relational database system to handle flight
bookings, passenger information, and scheduling.
 Gym Website (HTML , CSS , JS): Developed a responsive website showcasing gym services and
membership features.
 Sentiment Analysis Classification (Python): Implemented using Natural Language Processing (NLP)
techniques to classify text based on sentiment.
 Connect-4 Game (C++): Implemented game logic, win detection algorithms, and integrated audio
effects for an enhanced gameplay experience.
 Video Game Sales Prediction (Python): Applied Machine Learning algorithms to analyze datasets and
predict video game sales based on features such as genre, platform, and region.
 Tiny Compiler (C#): Developed a compiler for the Tiny language in C#, including lexical analysis, parsing,
and code generation.
 E-Commerce Website (Java, Spring Boot, Microservices): Developed the backend of an e-commerce
platform, implementing REST APIs, product and order management, and a scalable microservices
architecture.
 University Management System (ASP.NET Core MVC): Enabled the management of students,
instructors, and courses with defined roles and access levels for each user type. Implemented key
features such as user registration and login, CRUD operations, role-based access control, and data
management using Entity Framework Core.

SKILLS
Programming & Frameworks: C++, C#, Java, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, Spring Boot, Microservices,
Python
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL
Core Concepts: REST APIs, OOP, Data Structures, Algorithms, Problem Solving
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Leadership, Time Management, Networking Fundamentals

LANGUAGES
Arabic (Native)
English (Very good)
